claims.quote: If you are interested in learning more about volunteer or internship opportunities with AdventHealth Kissimmee, we would love to hear from you.
claims.claimText: Page offers volunteer and internship opportunities at AdventHealth Kissimmee; no mention of medical students, IMGs, observership, or USCE.
claims.limitations: Volunteer/intern program — not medical-student USCE. No explicit observership or visiting student signal.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Volunteer/intern program with healthcare-career adjacency but no explicit medical-student/IMG language; tagged Tier 1 for review but not promotable.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: If you're going to school to pursue a career in health care, then an internship at AdventHealth Kissimmee may be the perfect complement to your education.
claims.claimText: Generic healthcare-career internship offered at AdventHealth Kissimmee; audience not specified as medical students.
claims.limitations: Audience is 'school to pursue a career in health care' — undifferentiated; not specifically medical-student USCE.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Internship for health-care students at hospital — adjacent to USCE but lacks medical-student/IMG specificity.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: You must be at least 16 years of age to volunteer.

claims.quote: You must volunteer for a minimum of 100 hours. Most volunteers come in for one 4 hours shift each week, so you would reach 100 hours in six months.
claims.claimText: Minimum 100 volunteer hours, typically over six months.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Logged commitment requirement for the volunteer program.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: Prospective volunteers must provide proof of vaccinations for Mumps, Measles, Rubella, and Chicken Pox.
claims.claimText: Volunteers must provide proof of MMR and Varicella immunity.
claims.limitations: Vaccination requirement for volunteers — not USCE-specific.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Immunization requirement adjacent to typical USCE compliance documents.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: You will need to bring two (2) letters of recommendation with you to that interview.
claims.claimText: Two letters of recommendation required at the interview stage for volunteers.
claims.limitations: Document requirement applies to volunteer role, not USCE.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Volunteer document requirement; adjacent to USCE LOR signal.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: Background checks will be completed on all volunteers and interns, with the exception of those under the age of 18.
claims.claimText: Background checks required for all volunteers and interns (18+).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Background-check requirement adjacent to USCE compliance package.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required
